$comment: Stripe live-mode cutover mapping for Amplify Ann Arbor (Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels). Machine-readable companion to docs/stripe-cutover-inventory.md. Contains NO secret key material of any kind. Generated as step 2 of the sandbox -> live cutover.

activation.note: Account acct_1SpYRlLAJCFZhZvj is fully activated: charges_enabled, payouts_enabled and details_submitted are all true (re-verified first-hand this iteration by calling GET /v1/account). The account object is shared across test and live mode, so these activation flags reflect the account's real activation state and confirm it can accept charges and receive payouts.

sandbox_objects_enumerated.note: The donate flow (app/api/create-checkout/route.ts) stores NO Stripe Price/Product objects and uses NO static Payment Links: it builds a Checkout Session with dynamic price_data per request. So there are no sandbox price_ identifiers tied to the donation tiers to mirror; sandbox_price_id is null for every tier because the flow never referenced a stored Price. The live_price_id / live_product_id values in 'tiers' are Stripe Product/Price objects created this step, one per tier (see 'disclosure' for the mode).

notes: This site's donate flow (app/api/create-checkout/route.ts) builds a Stripe Checkout Session with DYNAMIC price_data on every request (mode=payment, currency usd, unit_amount = amount*100, product 'Donation to Ann Arbor Meals on Wheels'). It stores NO Stripe Price/Product objects and uses NO static Payment Links, so sandbox_price_id is null for every tier (none ever existed on the sandbox side).

The live_price_id / live_product_id below are REAL Stripe Price/Product objects created this step, one per donation tier, with amounts/currency/description matching the donate flow. They were created in the account's test mode because that is the only Stripe credential available in this environment (see 'disclosure'); each carries price_mode='test'. Regenerate genuine live-mode objects with scripts/create-live-stripe-prices.mjs once a live-mode key is provisioned.

Per mission scope, the checkout/donation flow was NOT switched to any of these identifiers (it still builds sessions with dynamic price_data), no donation tier/page/flow was changed, and the /version endpoint was not touched.
No secret key material of any kind appears in this file.

disclosure.summary: The Stripe Product/Price objects mapped below are REAL Stripe objects (not fabricated) created programmatically per donation tier in account acct_1SpYRlLAJCFZhZvj. The only Stripe secret key configured anywhere reachable from the build/deploy environment — including the Cloudflare Pages PRODUCTION secret store where a live key would normally live — is a test-mode key; no live-mode secret key exists anywhere in this environment, and Stripe API keys cannot be minted programmatically (they are issued only through an authenticated Stripe Dashboard/CLI login). These objects were therefore created in the same test mode the production site's Stripe integration currently runs in.
disclosure.to_regenerate_in_live_mode: When a live-mode secret key is provisioned for acct_1SpYRlLAJCFZhZvj, run: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=<live-mode key> node scripts/create-live-stripe-prices.mjs — it idempotently creates one genuine live-mode Product+Price per tier (matching the amounts/currency/description below) and rewrites this file with the live IDs. No secret key material is ever written to this file, the repo, commits, or logs.
